summary.text: Customers find the water bottle great for on-the-go activities, with one mentioning it's easy to clip onto a belt bag. The product receives positive feedback for its quality and ease of use.

insights.title: Portability
insights.summary: Customers find the water bottle easy to carry and convenient for on-the-go use, particularly during walks. One customer mentions it's easy to clip onto a belt bag.

examples.snippet: Love this water bottle. It is great for walks and easy to carry. My dog took to it well and didn’t have any issues with leakage etc.

Great for on the go with our pups!
Loved it and so does our grand dog. Truly is convenient when we take Lola on long walks in the summer.

authors_reviews.title: Handy and durable
authors_reviews.text: It’s been great for our doggo on long walks! Very durable!
authors_reviews.author: Womaninsky

authors_reviews.title: Buy this.
authors_reviews.text: Great product. Squeezes easily. So easily that the first time I squeezed water came shooting out of the cup. I got the 20 oz size because a larger size bowl bottle I already have was overkill for a 3 mile neighborhood walk. I will buy again.
authors_reviews.author: Dolin Dry Neat

authors_reviews.title: Wonderful!
authors_reviews.text: My pup loves it — and it’s easy to carry. My ‘pup’ is 107 lbs but she loves having her own drinks during her walk.
authors_reviews.author: bbtacoma

authors_reviews.title: Great idea
authors_reviews.text: Love the idea and great for walks and travel. Only thing is there’s a plastic piece in the center that allows water up and sucks back down any remainder. You have to keep the bottle squeezed for your dog to drink it or it makes the sucking noise and takes the water away which freaked my dog out and he won’t drink out of it. Plus he hates the plastic piece in the middle when he tries to drink. lol. I have a very sensitive dog who gets frightened or annoyed by pretty much anything. So it’s really not the product fault.
authors_reviews.author: Chazvous

authors_reviews.title: Easy to use
authors_reviews.text: Great for taking on long walks or hot days
authors_reviews.author: Christine A. Bzdelik

authors_reviews.title: Just okay
authors_reviews.text: This works but is not the miracle solution it is touted as... It is difficult to squeeze for water, even hurts my hand. I wish it was bigger, especially for the price. My favorite thing is the shade of green! Basically, I keep wondering why it was so expensive!
authors_reviews.author: Manon Pavy

authors_reviews.title: Nice bottle
authors_reviews.text: Very nice bottle. Very easy to open and close but you need some grip strength to squeeze the water out the top.
authors_reviews.author: karen

authors_reviews.title: Best travel water bottle
authors_reviews.text: we take our dog everywhere with us, and we have a great travel food/water bowl for when we’re going somewhere where we will be stopping for a bit. However for just a walk or running errands it doesn’t make sense to bring a separate water bottle and collapsible bowl, it’s just a hassle. I used to have one of those bottles where you press the button to fill the cup at the end and it was actually so hard to press it that it gave you blisters and didn’t drain well. I tried this bottle out and it is SO worth the money. It is super easy to clip onto my belt bag & just lean down and squeeze it for my dog to drink out of as we go. It drains super quick so we aren’t wasting water when he’s done. It is so convenient & I can see us using it constantly all summer. Highly recommend!
authors_reviews.author: MD

other_countries_reviews.title: Pups love
other_countries_reviews.text: Great size and works well pups loved and were drinking from it straight away!
other_countries_reviews.author: Maxcats

other_countries_reviews.title: Springer flip portable dog water bottle
other_countries_reviews.text: This is an amazing water bottle the best I have bought easy to use the water capacity is perfect and I love the way unused water is returned to the bottle an excellent purchase worth every penny
other_countries_reviews.author: Bobby

other_countries_reviews.title: A must buy for dog owners
other_countries_reviews.text: Dog trainer told me to buy this for my basenji because they prefer it. Found that even new born puppy’s that are nervy to eat and drink because it’s there first day home lap this up. Dogs really prefer drinking from it.
other_countries_reviews.author: Edd

other_countries_reviews.title: Great doggy bottle, no leaks!
other_countries_reviews.text: Great little drinks bottle for my dog. She happily laps it up.
other_countries_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

other_countries_reviews.title: Good quality product!
other_countries_reviews.text: My furbaby loves this, works well & hasn’t leaked!
